prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document provides information on the shingles vaccination that is relevant for adults with learning disabilities across the UK, including Scotland, where public health initiatives encompass vaccination programs. Therefore, it applies to Scotland as part of the wider UK healthcare framework.
